description: Persists each IoT telemetry message received from a Raspberry Pi device. Records are written by the Azure Function (iot-signalr-func) when a message arrives via IoT Hub. Used by the Power Pages History tab to display a durable event log.

columns.description: Auto-generated display name combining device ID and timestamp (e.g. raspberry-pi-iotpanel 2026-05-22T07:00:00Z).
Identifier of the IoT device that sent the telemetry, e.g. raspberry-pi-iotpanel.
Classification of the telemetry event, e.g. telemetry-snapshot, help-triggered, led_on, led_off.
GPIO pin number associated with this event (e.g. 18, 24, 25, 12, 5, 6, 13, 19). Null for non-pin-specific events.
Scalar value reported for this event, e.g. OK, MISMATCH, 1, 0.
True when the actual LED state does not match the expected state derived from switch positions.
JSON array representing the state of all physical switches at the time of the event, e.g. [1,0,1,0].
JSON array representing the actual observed state of all LEDs at the time of the event, e.g. [1,0,1,0].
JSON array representing the expected LED states derived from switch positions and active rule, e.g. [1,0,1,0].
Name of the rule active on the Pi at the time of the event, e.g. all_lights_on, switch_mirror.
